name: oh-my-chatpcb
description: Agent-native KiCad fork companion runtime for ChatPCB.

scripts.generate:sample: node ./bin/chatpcb-cli.js generate --project ./workspaces/sample-mcu --prompt "STM32 board with 3.3V regulator, reset button, I2C sensor connector, UART header, status LED"
scripts.verify:sample: npm run generate:sample && npm run validate:sample && npm run simulate:sample
